narrative:
Paint Twp township has 726 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points.
